expectations.text: response-is-pure-ascii: every character is printable 7-bit ASCII, tab, or newline
no-prose-sentences: words appear only as banners or short diagram labels
expectations.evidence: Only content besides the banner is the label '234 x 17 ----^' pointing at the answer - not a sentence.
5-row block-digit banner rendered with the bundled banner.py (output matches banner.py '3978' exactly).
Banner spells 3978 (234 * 17 = 3978); arrow label ties it to the question.
